messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] EuroBioC2026 Streaming
messages.body_plain:
Dear Bioconductor community,
Can't join EuroBioC2026 in person? We've got you covered.
All conference sessions will be streamed live and are free to attend online. Each session room has its own streaming link, so be sure to use the appropriate link for the session you would like to follow.
You can find all streaming links here:
https://eurobioc2026.bioconductor.org/pages/streaming.html#streaming
Best regards,
Laurah Ondari
Bioconductor Community Engagement Support
Bioinformatician, International Institute of Tropical Agriculture (IITA)


	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] Landing page does not match the current version of my package
messages.subject_clean: [Bioc-devel] Landing page does not match the current version of my package
messages.body_plain:
Hello,

I don't think the message is being allowed through because of the images referenced/included. The bioc-devel mailing list does not allow image attachments.

For others can reference the original question:
Why do the landing page versions of my package at bioconductor.org  do not match the checktable at Runiverse page?

We do not use R-universe yet as the default build for packages; that is in process. We still have our linux builders
https://bioconductor.org/checkResults/.  We pull windows and some mac products from R-universe but compared to the passing version of our linux builder as there are certain Bioconductor criteria that is being checked and processed on the linux builders that we have not yet implemented on R-universe only builds.

The build reports and landing pages are lagging as there was an issue with the post processing infrastructure on our end.  We apologize that we did not announce this more broadly on the mailing list for reference and to avoid confusion; we will make sure to do this in the future.  We have implemented a fix and expect the builds to resume and update within the next 24 hours.  Thank you for your patience and understanding.

We appreciate your diligence to the Bioconductor builds and clarification question.

Cheers,



Lori Kern

Bioconductor Core Team

Roswell Park Comprehensive Cancer Center

Department of Biostatistics & Bioinformatics

Elm & Carlton Streets

Buffalo, New York 14263

If you have received this message in error, please notify the sender immediately by e-mail and delete this email message from your computer. Thank you.
